displayDescription.zh:
2016 年，高华、刘壮、劳伦斯·范德马滕和基利安·温伯格公开 DenseNet。与残差网络相加特征不同，DenseNet 在一个密集块内把前面所有层的特征图拼接起来，作为下一层输入；具有 L 层的网络因此形成 L(L+1)/2 条直接连接。

这种设计让早期提取的边缘、纹理等特征可以被后续层反复利用，也为梯度提供更短的传播路径。论文实验显示，DenseNet 能以较少参数取得有竞争力的图像分类结果。它把“每层都能访问历史特征”发展成明确架构，成为特征复用与高效连接设计的重要范例。
displayDescription.en:
In 2016, Gao Huang, Zhuang Liu, Laurens van der Maaten, and Kilian Weinberger released DenseNet. Unlike residual networks, which add feature maps, DenseNet concatenated the outputs of every earlier layer inside a dense block and supplied them to each later layer. A network with L layers therefore contained L(L+1)/2 direct connections.

The design allowed later layers to reuse edges, textures, and other features extracted earlier, while giving gradients shorter routes through the network. The paper showed competitive image-classification accuracy with relatively few parameters. DenseNet turned the idea that every layer should have access to the feature history into an explicit architecture and became an influential example of feature reuse and efficient connectivity.

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

html.zh: DenseNet 在密集块中把每一层连接到后续所有层。这促进了特征复用，改善了梯度流动，并提供了比单纯加宽或加深网络更紧凑的方案。
html.en: DenseNet connected each layer to every later layer within a dense block. This encouraged feature reuse, improved gradient flow, and offered a compact alternative to simply making networks wider or deeper.

html.zh: 每一层都会接收同一块中所有早期层的特征图。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。
html.en: Every layer receives the feature maps of all earlier layers in the same block. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 DenseNet 视为对特征复用和梯度流动有重要影响的架构，即使部署中常使用更新的骨干网络。它的长期影响在于密集连接模式阐明了短路径和复用特征如何改进深度 CNN。
html.en: Experts generally treat DenseNet as an influential architecture for feature reuse and gradient flow, even when newer backbones are preferred in deployment. Its long-term legacy is the dense-connectivity pattern that clarified how short paths and reused features can improve deep CNNs.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。

category.en: Deep Learning and the Unification of Paradigms (2010s-2020s)
category.zh: 深度学习与范式归一（2010年代至2020年代）

quote.en: "DenseNet connected each layer to all later layers, improving feature reuse and gradient flow while encouraging compact convolutional models."
quote.zh: "DenseNet 将每一层连接到后续所有层，增强了特征复用和梯度流动，也推动了更紧凑的卷积模型设计。"

workAuthors.en: Gao Huang, Zhuang Liu, Laurens van der Maaten, and Kilian Q. Weinberger, CVPR, 2017
workAuthors.zh: 黄高、刘壮、Laurens van der Maaten、Kilian Q. Weinberger，CVPR，2017

quotePage.en: CVPR 2017 paper: Densely Connected Convolutional Networks
quotePage.zh: CVPR 2017 论文《密集连接卷积网络》

quoteAttribution.en: Densely Connected Convolutional Networks, Gao Huang, Zhuang Liu, Laurens van der Maaten, and Kilian Q. Weinberger, CVPR, 2017
quoteAttribution.zh: 《密集连接卷积网络》, 黄高、刘壮、Laurens van der Maaten、Kilian Q. Weinberger，CVPR，2017

demo.en: Every layer receives the feature maps of all earlier layers in the same block.
demo.zh: 每一层都会接收同一块中所有早期层的特征图。

text.en: Later layers can directly use earlier features.
text.zh: 后续层可以直接使用早期特征。

text.en: Many short paths help gradient flow through the network.
text.zh: 许多短路径帮助梯度在网络中流动。

text.en: Every layer receives the feature maps of all earlier layers in the same block.
text.zh: 每一层都会接收同一块中所有早期层的特征图。
